nasb.text: And he said, “Who are You, Lord?” And He said,  “I am Jesus whom you are persecuting,

esv.text: And he said, “Who are you, Lord?” And he said, “I am Jesus, whom you are persecuting.

cnv.text: 他說：“主啊，你是誰？”主說：“我就是你所迫害的耶穌。

ccb.text: 他说：“主啊，你是谁？”那声音说：“我就是你所迫害的耶稣。

csbs.text: 他问：“主啊，你到底是谁？” 主说：“我就是你所逼迫的耶稣。
